column2: EPIC J Jonah Jameson's Tornado of Terrigen Mists
column23: Really interesting game for the final! Hiroim was the MVP, Right was focusing on him and Rick Jones, while Left was using Thanos, Captain Marvel & Lady Thor. Getting Lady Thor's Rare in early game was really helpful, but Hiroim and his Rare has overwhelemed the MM and delivered the Final Blow!

Well, JJJ continues to be deceptively difficult.  First game was rough in the beginning with a chunk of twists too close together.  Second game had a much better start and thank goodness Lady Thor decided to hit hard (those 6 drops saved the day). We took a while trying to determine which route we really wanted to go when it came to hero choices. Ultimately Ollie decided that we had a ton of Blue/Green so we went with Captain Marvel & Ms America. Honestly --- we're just glad we won.

Left side had a Thanos/Hiroim deck, right side had Captain Marvel/Lady Thor. Rick Jones was a filler for both decks. Hiroim helped in thinning the other deck. In the end the Marvel/Thor deck had so much draw and so little 0-cost left, it worked like a well oiled machine. My final turn I raked up 26 recruit and 52 attack to clear out the remainder of the city and JJJ with his 2 tactics. Final twist was two turns down, I doubt the Thanos/Hiroim side would have been able to finish it. Loved the game!
